h085a05aeg86e2g490bgb1e3g149de4f7ec1d: Pretty stubborn for a man wearin' leaves.
h5c9498bfg8ee4g4ba2g801eg4b05b3cbdcb6: Maybe we can set him on fire.
hf3855fe4gd4e3g434eg9746g5a523a51ba3c: We should set the whole grove on fire.
h6e1a8fd5g796cg469ega80fgd2203c58764f: Minthara's gonna skin us. No one knows about this damn weapon.
hb52bdf1bg909eg479eg9dfegf5be80f97a11: Yeah. She'll kill us dead if we go back without it.
hb005e819gbf90g47bcg824egde79daa1f790: We'll get the druid talking. Grove's got to be full of magic.
hb181b817gef5ag456bgb0dbgd985ba2a6474: That's why I've been stabbin' all the rats. Might be spies.
h2d555844gc589g4198g95f0g593567963d29: This was more fun when he was screamin'.
hd57a879bg1503g4f8dgae4bg6af6743f0b1d: Could wake him up by choppin' off a toe. That'd be funny.
hc91d6db9g50fbg4492gb49bg9a964f01743c: Yeah. Give him somethin' to cry about.
hf96cfde6gd758g4c52g803ag7cd3b85200fe: Don't wear his voice out. We still need answers.
h41b10866gc782g4704g87f2g334be9e4e70e: No sign of the others yet. You think the fight up front went... bad?
h97f22e1bg0faeg4b7ag84c7g4f2ade32f3e0: Shut it. Boss would rip ya for talking that way.
h612dc1e1ge0d6g455bgb83bgc0ba874fa333: Least we got the druid to keep ourselves entertained.
h917353c6ge13fg4f9dg8592gf9dfe9521c62: He's boring. Let's find another one.
